extra.description: Our cutting-edge language model for code completion released end of July 2025, Codestral specializes in low-latency, high-frequency tasks such as fill-in-the-middle (FIM) and code generation.
Our state-of-the-art semantic for extracting representation of code extracts
An updated Lean 4 formal proof engineering model optimised for automated theorem proving and autoformalization. 119B total parameters, 6.5B active.
A math dedicated model for research purposes under an open license.

Ministral 3 14B is the largest model in the Ministral 3 family, offering state-of-the-art capabilities and performance comparable to its larger Mistral Small 3.2 24B counterpart. Optimized for local deployment, it delivers high performance across diverse hardware, including local setups.

Ministral 3 3B is the smallest and most efficient model in the Ministral 3 family, offering robust language and vision capabilities in a compact package. Designed for edge deployment, it delivers high performance across diverse hardware, including local setups.

Ministral 3 8B is a powerful and efficient model in the Ministral 3 family, offering best-in-class text and vision capabilities. Built for edge deployment, it delivers high performance across diverse hardware, including local setups.
Our state-of-the-art semantic for extracting representation of code extracts
Mistral Large 3, is a state-of-the-art, open-weight, general-purpose multimodal model with a granular Mixture-of-Experts architecture. It features 41B active parameters and 675B total parameters.
Our frontier-class multimodal model optimized for agentic and coding use cases. Released as open weights under a Modified MIT license.
Our latest moderation model with 128k context window and jailbreaking detection. Strong performance on complex multilingual data including long multi-turn conversations.
A prototype model, designed to be brief and concise.

Our OCR service powering our Document AI stack that enables our users to extract interleaved text and images. OCR 4 is available as the newer model. OCR 3 remains available for existing integrations and production workloads.
Our latest OCR service powering our Document AI stack, with native paragraph-level bounding box extraction and structural block labels.
Our powerful hybrid model unifying instruct, reasoning, and coding capabilities in a single model. 119B parameters with 6.5B active.
An efficient audio input model, pre-trained and optimized for transcription purposes only.
An efficient audio input model, pre-trained and optimized for transcription purposes only.
An efficient audio input model, pre-trained and optimized for live transcription purposes only.
Our state-of-the-art text-to-speech model with zero-shot voice cloning. Supports 9 languages, streaming with ~90ms time-to-first-audio, and no transcript required for voice prompts.
Our first model with audio input capabilities for instruct use cases.
Our first cutting-edge language model for coding and FIM, released under the MNPL license.
Our cutting-edge language model for coding. Codestral specializes in low-latency, high-frequency tasks such as fill-in-the-middle (FIM), code correction and test generation.
Our frontier code agents model for solving software engineering tasks; excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents.
An enterprise grade text model, that excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents.
A 24B text model, open source model that excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents.
An update to our open source model that excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents. Learn more in our blog post
Our open source model that excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents.
Our first open-source code agent designed for Lean 4, built for formal proof engineering in realistic repositories. 119B parameters with 6.5B active.

An experimental specialized small model trained on meticulously curated data, designed for creative writing, narrative generation, roleplay and character-driven dialog, general-purpose instruction following and conversational agents.
Our first frontier-class reasoning model released June 2025.
Our frontier-class reasoning model released July 2025.
Our frontier-class multimodal reasoning model update of September 2025.
Our first small reasoning model released June 2025. Learn more in our blog post
Our small reasoning model released July 2025.
Our small multimodal reasoning model update of September 2025.
Powerful edge model with extremely high performance/price ratio. Learn more in our blog post
Our very first open model, SOTA competing against models up to 2 to 3x larger.
An update to our first open model with better context.
Our first and larger SOTA model for enterprise use cases with powerfull chat capabilities.
A powerfull model with open weights under a MRL license, competing agains SOTA much larger models.
Our top-tier large model for high-complexity tasks with the lastest version released November 2024.
Reach out to get access to Mistral Medium 1.0 weights.
Our frontier-class multimodal model released May 2025. Learn more in our blog post
Our frontier-class multimodal model released August 2025. Improving tone and performance.
Our moderation service that enables our users to detect harmful text content
Our OCR service powering our Document AI stack that enables our users to extract interleaved text and images
A finetuned Small model trained on meticulously curated datasets from across the Middle East and South Asia.
An enterprise grade small model for efficiency.
An update to our efficient small model with open weights under an MRL license.
A small efficient and powerfull 24B open model for personal or commercial use.
A new leader in the small models category with image understanding capabilities, released March 2025.
An update to our previous small model, released June 2025.
A coding dedicated model using a mamba 2 architecture for research purposes under an open license.
Our best multilingual open source model released July 2024.
A large open MoE model competing with much larger dense models.
Our first open MoE model, SOTA competing against models up to 2 to 3x larger.
A 12B model with image understanding capabilities in addition to text.
Our first frontier-class multimodal model released November 2024. Learn more in our blog post
A mini version of our first audio input model.
